test_coverage.criterion: AC-1: Code added to arch-interview-producer that runs before yielding need-user-input
AC-2: Executes projctl territory map to get file structure
AC-3: Executes projctl memory query with domain-specific queries
AC-4: Parses territory and memory results into structured data
AC-5: Handles errors - territory map failure yields blocked, memory timeout continues with note
AC-6: Logs context sources used and information gathered
AC-7: Context stored in yield metadata for traceability

additional_tests.name: test_full_gather_workflow
additional_tests.purpose: Integration test verifying complete GATHER workflow is documented

verification.failure_reason: Feature not yet implemented - GATHER phase documentation incomplete
